name: Shajahan
title: A Bit About Me
description:
Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience in building scalable healthcare and enterprise applications. Skilled in modern web technologies including Angular, Next.js, NestJS, and GraphQL, with strong expertise in backend architecture and API development.

Experienced in designing microservices-based systems, optimizing application performance, and implementing cloud-native solutions on Azure. Proven track record of working closely with clients and stakeholders to gather requirements, define workflows, and deliver high-quality products.

Hands-on experience in DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and infrastructure provisioning using Terraform. Adept at improving system reliability through observability, monitoring, and cost optimization strategies.

A proactive team player with leadership experience in mentoring developers, managing tasks, and driving projects from concept to production.
